title: Login Issues - Can't Access Account
description: Customer is unable to log in to their account despite multiple attempts to reset password.

title: Payment Failed During Checkout
description: User reports payment failure when trying to complete purchase using credit card.

title: Page Not Loading
description: Dashboard page is stuck on loading and never renders content.

title: Error 500 on Profile Update
description: Server error occurs when user tries to update profile information.

title: Email Notifications Not Sending
description: Users are not receiving email notifications after actions.

title: Slow Website Performance
description: Website is taking too long to load on mobile devices.

title: Incorrect Billing Amount
description: Customer was charged more than expected for subscription renewal.

title: Search Function Not Working
description: Search results are not appearing for valid queries.

title: File Upload Failed
description: Users cannot upload images due to server rejection.

title: UI Layout Broken on Safari
description: Layout breaks when viewed on Safari browser.
